name: BUKI TATSUJIN RYUU: RYOKOU DANGAN (TRIPPING SHOT)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 17

Components: M, F

You may make a ranged attack at you highest attack bonus. If you hit your attack deals half damage and your opponent must make a strength check DC 10 + the user's Dex Mod + 5. If he fails, he falls prone to the ground.

BUKI TATSUJIN RYUU: SENBON TOORIAME (WEAPON MASTER STYLE: SENBON SHOWER)

Taijutsu (Strike; Requires Weapon Master 2, Ranged Mastery (f)) [Armed]

Rank: 6 (C); Learn DC: 19, 2 successes; Perform: 8 (DC 19); Time: 1 attack action; Components: M, F; Range: Medium; Area: Cone shaped burst or line; Duration: Instant; Save: Reflex half; Cost: 4 + 2 per additional needle.

The user throws a large amount of senbon at an area skewering anyone in the area of effect. This technique deal 1d4+1 damage per needle thrown. Anyone in the area may make a Reflex save to take half damage.

Additional damage, such as sneak attack, mastercraft, magical damage, precision, or weapon specialization bonus damage is only applied to the original thrown weapon, and no Senbon Tooriame benefits from the Shuriken Expert class abilities. The user may target a creature more than once during the use of this technique, and Senbon Tooriame cannot deal critical hits.

Requires: Weapon Master 5 and Ranged Mastery (f), Improved Trip (f)

Material Focus: The users senbon.

Empower: The user may increase the number of Senbon Tooriame by 1 at the cost of two additional points of Chakra (maximum 1 per 1 level in total).

Mastery: The 1st, 3rd, and 5th step of mastery decreases the penalty to attack by 1 (-2 penalty at 5th step).
